message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor black
  ActorBorderColor black
  ActorBackgroundColor lightgray
}

participant "Client" as Client
participant "Server" as Server

box "Authentication" #LightGray
    Client ->> Server: 1 REQUEST (AuthenticationRequest)
    activate Server
    Server -->> Client: 2.1 ACCEPT-REQUEST (AuthenticationResponse)
    deactivate Server
    Server -->> Client: 2.2 REJECT-REQUEST (AuthenticationResponse)
endbox

box "Request Delete a file" #LightGray
    Client ->> Server: 3 REQUEST (DeleteFolderRequest)
    activate Server
    Server -->> Client: 4.1 ACCEPT-REQUEST (DeleteFolderResponse)
    deactivate Server
    Server -->> Client: 4.2 REJECT-REQUEST (DeleteFolderResponse)
endbox

@enduml
```
